title: Alignment Research Ecosystem - MATS, Redwood, Apollo, METR

questions.question: What does MATS do, and what is its rough scale?
options: ML Alignment & Theory Scholars: a research mentorship program with 527+ scholars since 2021, 180+ papers, and roughly 80% of pre-2025 alumni working on safety/security
A regulatory body that issues AI export licenses
A frontier safety institute owned by the EU
questions.question_zh: MATS 是做什么的,大致规模如何?
options_zh: 一项 reward-model 训练服务
ML Alignment & Theory Scholars: 一个研究导师项目,自 2021 年以来累计 527+ 学者、180+ 篇论文,2025 年前的校友约有 80% 投身于安全 / 安全研究
一家颁发 AI 出口许可证的监管机构
一所由欧盟运营的前沿安全研究所

questions.question: Which agenda did Redwood Research introduce?
options: AI Control (Lesson 10): safety despite subversion via U / T / H protocols
questions.question_zh: Redwood Research 提出了哪一研究 agenda?
options_zh: 面向 LLM 的差分隐私
AI Control (Lesson 10): 通过 U / T / H 协议在颠覆下保持安全
通过 SynthID 做水印
Constitutional AI

questions.question: Which organisation authored the In-Context Scheming paper and the 'Towards Safety Cases for AI Scheming' framework?
questions.question_zh: In-Context Scheming 论文以及「Towards Safety Cases for AI Scheming」框架是哪家机构发表的?
options_zh: METR
MATS
Eleos AI
Apollo Research

questions.question: What is METR's distinctive methodological style in the alignment ecosystem?
options: Task-based capability evaluations, autonomous-task time-horizon studies, and framework synthesis (e.g., 'Common Elements of Frontier AI Safety Policies')
questions.question_zh: METR 在对齐生态中独特的方法论风格是什么?
options_zh: 对 base model 做对抗训练
基于任务的能力评估、自主任务时间跨度研究,以及框架综合 (例如「Common Elements of Frontier AI Safety Policies」)
硬件 attestation 的可验证推理
仅做闭源 red-teaming

questions.question: Why does multi-organisation co-authorship matter for safety claims?
options: It is mandated by the EU AI Act
Labs evaluating their own models have a structural conflict of interest; external evaluators (Redwood, Apollo, METR, Eleos, UK AISI) can raise and validate failure modes the lab might underreport
questions.question_zh: 为什么多机构联合署名对安全主张很重要?
options_zh: 可以提高引用数
可以加快论文发表
EU AI Act 强制要求
实验室对自家模型的评估存在结构性的利益冲突; 外部评估者 (Redwood、Apollo、METR、Eleos、UK AISI) 可以提出并验证实验室自己可能少报的失败模式

questions.question: What is Eleos AI Research's primary contribution to the ecosystem?
options: Pre-deployment model-welfare evaluations (Lesson 19), including the external welfare assessment in Claude Opus 4's system card
questions.question_zh: Eleos AI Research 在生态中的主要贡献是什么?
options_zh: AI Control benchmark
水印标准
California 训练数据法案的起草
部署前的 model-welfare 评估 (Lesson 19),包括 Claude Opus 4 system card 中的外部 welfare 评估
